components: 3-6 metric cards with current value + delta % + sparkline trend; color coded by direction
when_to_use: Top of any analytics dashboard; first thing user sees on login; primary health indicators

components: Fixed left sidebar (240px) + collapsible to icon-only (64px) + main content area + optional right panel
when_to_use: Any product with 5+ navigation destinations; enterprise tools; admin panels; always prefer for desktop-primary products

components: Sortable columns + column visibility toggle + row checkbox + bulk action toolbar + pagination; sticky header
when_to_use: Displaying lists of entities (users; orders; transactions); requires bulk operations; more than 10 rows

components: Left vertical tab navigation by category (Account; Security; Notifications; Billing) + content panel with save per section
when_to_use: Any product with 10+ settings; prevents overwhelming single long form; enables deep-linking to specific section

components: Label + description + toggle right-aligned; section dividers; optional badge for new settings
when_to_use: Boolean preferences (email notifications; feature flags; privacy settings); never use for critical irreversible settings

components: Sidebar or modal checklist with completion percentage; each item links to relevant feature; collapses when 100%
when_to_use: New user activation; feature adoption; empty state escape; keep to 5-7 items max

components: Illustration + explanatory headline + benefit statement + single primary CTA; no secondary actions
when_to_use: First visit to any section with no data yet; guide user to create first item; remove all friction

components: Step indicator (1 of N) + focused single-question form + back/next navigation; skip option if appropriate
when_to_use: Initial account configuration; complex integrations; multi-org setup; use when >5 required fields at first run

components: Click cell to activate edit mode; input replaces display value; Enter to save; Escape to cancel; dirty indicator
when_to_use: Bulk editing scenarios; spreadsheet-like workflows; updating single fields without navigating away

components: Row with expand chevron; expanded area shows related detail without navigation; lazy-loaded content
when_to_use: Master-detail relationships where full page navigation is too heavy; order items; nested records

components: 2-column layout for related fields (first/last name; city/zip); full-width for standalone fields; clear section headers
when_to_use: Long forms with logical field groupings; reduces perceived length; desktop-primary; never use on mobile (stack to 1 col)

components: Bell icon with badge; dropdown/drawer with grouped notifications (Today/Earlier); mark-all-read; deep link per item
when_to_use: Any product with async events (comments; mentions; system alerts); required for collaboration products

components: Keyboard shortcut (Cmd+K) triggers full-screen overlay; instant search across all entities; recent items default
when_to_use: Power user navigation; products with many entities; developer tools; reduces clicks for frequent actions

components: Error illustration + what went wrong + specific action to fix it (Retry / Contact support) + error code
when_to_use: API failures; empty search results; permission errors; never show raw error messages to end users
